title: Participation Rates in Higher Education: 2006 to 2018
body: "These statistics include the higher education participation rate for students who are:   17 to 30 years old in higher education (HE) for the first time living in England in UK HE institutions and English, Welsh and Scottish further education providers staying in HE for at least 6 months   Statistics are available by age, sex and mode of study (full-time or part-time). Experimental breakdowns are also included for level of study and provider type. Region of domicile data will follow at a later date.  Higher education analysis  Email: HE.statistics@education.gov.uk "

taxons.title: Further and higher education courses and qualifications
